## InteractiveMode class

InteractiveMode plugin - adds -i/--interactive flag and handles interactive command building when triggered.

Usage:

```
const interactive = new InteractiveMode({ pluginName: 'generate', globalFlags })
yargsInstance = interactive.install(yargsInstance, yargsFactory)
await interactive.run(args)  // Instead of yargs.parseAsync(args)
```

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class InteractiveMode<T = object> implements YargsPlugin<T>
```

**Implements:** [YargsPlugin](./stripe-cli-plugin-bootstrap.yargsplugin.md)<!-- -->&lt;T&gt;
